channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: Meet SK Hynix, the trillion-dollar South Korean chipmaker debuting on U.S. markets
item.description: Following a more than sevenfold rally in its stock price over the past year, South Korea's SK Hynix is listing on the Nasdaq.

item.title: Delta expects higher airfare to last, bringing 2026 profit goal in reach, CEO says
item.description: Delta is the first of the U.S. airlines to report second-quarter results.

item.title: Circle gets an OCC bank charter as stablecoin competition heats up, shares surge 14%
item.description: Stablecoin issuer Circle surged in premarket trading after the U.S. Office of the Comptroller of the Currency granted it approval to operate as a trust bank.

item.title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Delta, Circle, Vodafone, Intel and more
item.description: These are the stocks posting the largest moves premarket.

item.title: S&P 500 futures are little changed as index heads for winning week: Live updates
item.description: Wall Street is coming off a winning day, following a jump in chipmakers and falling oil prices.

item.title: This e-commerce stock could get a boost from the agentic AI craze, Stifel says
item.description: Shopify is poised to gain ground due to the expected growth of agentic AI, per Stifel.

item.title: Meta found to breach EU laws with 'addictive' Instagram, Facebook designs
item.description: Instagram and Facebook's "addictive" designs have put Meta in breach of the European Union's digital laws, the EU concluded Friday in a preliminary report.

item.title: AI, data center fears could be key in closely watched Michigan Democratic Senate primary
item.description: Abdul El-Sayed and Rep. Haley Stevens will face off in the Michigan Democratic Senate primary on Aug. 4.

item.title: World oil demand set for first annual decline since 2020, IEA says
item.description: Renewed escalation in the U.S.-Iran war could complicate matters and further cloud the outlook, the IEA warned Friday.

item.title: OpenAI exec Fidji Simo says she's stepping down due to chronic illness, will transition to advisor
item.description: Fidji Simo stepped away from OpenAI in April for a medical leave, says she now has to focus on recovery.

item.title: The Tech Download: Teen social media bans miss a key part of the puzzle: AI chatbots
item.description: Teenagers are increasingly becoming dependent on AI chatbots, echoing a familiar problem with social media in the 2010s.

item.title: Inside NATO's extraordinary 48 hours that revealed Trump's grip on global diplomacy
item.description: Steve Sedgwick goes behind the scenes of NATO's dramatic 48 hours, where Trump's changing tone reshaped diplomacy and left allies guessing.

item.title: New Fed task force members share Chairman Kevin Warsh's embrace of AI
item.description: The three members of a task force advising the Fed on artificial intelligence are strong proponents of the technology.

item.title: U.S. to continue 'technical talks' with Iran after Trump said ceasefire was 'over'
item.description: The ceasefire signed last month came under serious strain in recent days as the U.S. and Iranian forces exchanged attacks for consecutive days this week.

item.title: EasyJet pops 13% as airline weighs $7.7 billion rival takeover bid from Apollo
item.description: A bidding war has broken out for budget carrier easyJet after Apollo and Castlelake have both submitted takeover offers.

item.title: This luxury homebuilding stock is a good play on 'K-shaped economy,' Citi says
item.description: As a luxury homebuilding stock, Toll Brothers offers a way to play the increasing bifurcation of the economy, per Citi Research.

item.title: America's Top States for Business 2026: See the full rankings and where your state finished
item.description: CNBC's annual study puts all 50 states to the test across 138 metrics and 10 categories of competitiveness. These are America's Top States for Business.

item.title: Ukraine escalates attacks on tankers near Crimea as Russian fuel shortages bite
item.description: The drone strikes form part of Ukraine's campaign designed to choke off supplies and transportation routes in and out of Crimea.

item.title: Abivax $920 million cash haul lets it prepare for solo U.S. launch instead of relying on a buyer, CEO tells CNBC
item.description: Its latest fundraising round provides the French biotech with enough cash to finance operations through 2029.

item.title: Volkswagen to slash model lineup and shrink capacity — but no word on job cuts
item.description: The update followed a high-stakes boardroom showdown with the group's supervisory board.

item.title: It's a jam-packed afternoon of developments impacting 7 portfolio stocks
item.description: Every weekday, the Investing Club releases the Homestretch; an actionable afternoon update just in time for the last hour of trading.

item.title: 3 bucket-list trips you can book with the Sapphire Preferred's 100,000-point bonus
item.description: You can turn the Chase Sapphire Preferred's all-time high intro bonus into $1,500+ in travel.

item.title: Kevin Warsh names members of his Federal Reserve task forces, including Marc Andreessen, Doug McMillon
item.description: Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh on Thursday released names of the experts who will comprise five task forces to examine the institution's operations.

item.title: A huge trade just happened on the Nasdaq 100. Bulls are taking notice
item.description: Tech bulls may not have to wait much longer for fresh highs, if the single-biggest trade in the Invesco QQQ Trust ETF on Thursday is any indication.

item.title: Alleged Reflecting Pool vandal David Hearn pleads not guilty; lawyer calls him 'scapegoat'
item.description: "If Mr. Hearn can be charged with a felony for touching the Reflecting Pool, every American is at risk," a lawyer said as he blasted the Trump administration.

item.title: Prediction markets spark insider trading concerns. Here's how Goldman and other companies are responding
item.description: CNBC reached out to 50 companies about what are their trading policies for employees on prediction markets. A handful had an answer.

item.title: India ramps up missile sales in Indo-Pacific as China’s assertiveness turns neighbors wary
item.description: India has signed a third pact for the supply of missiles in the Indo-Pacific region as countries in the region grow wary of China's growing assertion.

item.title: Anduril CEO says it's bad to IPO in ‘middle of a hype cycle’
item.description: Anduril recently hit a $61 billion valuation, becoming one of the most highly valued private tech companies.

item.title: Florida's Palm Beach airport renamed for Trump
item.description: Palm Beach International Airport is now called President Donald J. Trump International Airport, the FAA said Thursday.

item.title: These 10 states are best positioned to land AI data center deals despite rising public opposition
item.description: These ten U.S. states have the best infrastructure to win future AI data center deals despite rising public opposition.
